label: Create palette from photo
script: Create a new palette by just uploading a photo.
note: Upload a photo to create palette

label: Rename palette
script: Rename the color palette to something meaningful.
note: Set palette name to 'blues' and pull back to see new palette name

label: Add color swatches
script: Click to start adding color samples.
note: Zoom to click the 'add swatches (click)' checkbox

label: Double-click to add samples
script: [ no narration -- let the visual speak ]
note: Double-click to add some color samples
